payload.answer: Extracted three durable memory cards: Sam's employment change, his music listening preferences, and a planned AI infrastructure discussion with Daniele.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman Sachs last month and joined Point72.
Sam continues listening to Bill Evans, but lately more early Coltrane.
Daniele wants to catch up with Sam about AI infrastructure and will send an article.
